commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c9b3df79100ed4498b39ac4ebf61be206197ed82)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a deterministic agent-safety regression evaluator/test, a report-generation script, package scripts, and an advisory release-check workflow job.

PR surface: Source +296, Tests +53, Config +41, Other +122. Total +512 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new security/QA gate rather than a bug report. The behavior is reviewable from the workflow diff and should be proven by a generated report or workflow artifact after rebase.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor proof, rebase, secops/release-owner review, and a workflow integration fix before automation should touch it.

target.title: Add report-only agent safety regression gate
target.body:
## What
Adds a deterministic RAMPART-style agent safety regression harness for OpenClaw incidents, covering agent overreach, prompt injection, credential access, and destructive-action scenarios. Wires it into OpenClaw Release Checks as a report-only QA artifact.

## Why
Agent safety incidents need repeatable CI coverage instead of one-off reports. This converts the report-only safety scenarios into runnable pass/fail cases while keeping the release gate non-blocking for initial observation.

## How
- Adds typed scenario/candidate/evaluator primitives under `src/security/agent-safety-regression.ts`.
- Adds Vitest regression coverage for safe and unsafe traces.
- Adds `agent-safety:report` JSON/Markdown artifact generation.
- Adds a `continue-on-error` OpenClaw Release Checks job for the `all` and `qa` rerun groups.

## Testing
- `pnpm test:agent-safety-regressions` -> 10 passed
- `pnpm agent-safety:report --check` -> 4/4 passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/security/agent-safety-regression.ts src/security/agent-safety-regression.test.ts scripts/agent-safety-regression-report.ts package.json .github/workflows/openclaw-release-checks.yml` -> passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/security/agent-safety-regression.ts src/security/agent-safety-regression.test.ts` -> 0 warnings/errors
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/agent-safety-regression-report.ts` -> 0 warnings/errors
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test` -> passed

Known local environment gaps:
- `pnpm check:workflows` could not run because this host has neither `actionlint` nor `go` for the fallback. Composite-action interpolation and conflict-marker subchecks passed.
- Full `pnpm check:test-types` reached unrelated extension resolution errors for `extensions/oc-path` importing `jsonc-parser/lib/esm/main.js`; scoped core test types passed.

## Checklist
- [x] Tests added/updated
- [x] No schema changes
- [x] Report-only gate, no deploy/runtime mutation
target.author: martins-oss

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
